name: hero-terminal
description: A developer-first two-column hero: copy on the left, a decorative terminal showing an install command on the right. Stacks on mobile. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a single h1 for the headline and labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby
The terminal is purely illustrative (aria-hidden) and does not affect contrast of the text
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a developer-tool hero with a terminal or code preview
a CLI product hero showing an install command
examples: <HeroTerminal title="Your components, one command away" subtitle="Copy-paste blocks you own." primaryAction={{ label: 'Read the docs', href: '/docs' }} secondaryAction={{ label: 'GitHub', href: '#' }} />
